prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on TEMPO (2,2,6,6-tetramethylpiperidine-1-oxyl) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (chemkit tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2 (doublet, UKS open-shell). Geometry taken from the user-supplied .xyz file at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz; used as-is (single-point, not re-optimized at this level). SCF converged in 12 cycles. No warnings reported — clean run. Integrity check: trustworthy = true.

Results:
  HOMO (SOMO, index 86): −6.3375439 eV
  LUMO (index 87):       −2.4651235 eV
  HOMO–LUMO gap:          3.8724203 eV  ← headline value

Koopmans' theorem estimates: vertical IP = 6.3375 eV, vertical EA = 2.4651 eV, electronegativity = 4.4013 eV, chemical hardness = 1.9362 eV, chemical softness = 0.5165 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity index = 5.0025 eV.

Total electronic energy: −483.88366 Hartree. Occupied orbitals: 87; total orbitals: 898.

CLI invocation: cli.py frontier --method dft --charge 0 --mult 2 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard tempo.xyz
